## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting for GrowthX's rebranding project with Noboringdesign (NBD)](https://fathom.video/share/vzEfX2MpFMsW__xCkj-Gfxs9yQjxhDRR?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX seeks a refined brand identity balancing human touch with AI expertise](https://fathom.video/share/vzEfX2MpFMsW__xCkj-Gfxs9yQjxhDRR?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [Project timeline: \~1.5 months, covering kickoff, moodboarding, concepting, brand identity, and guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/vzEfX2MpFMsW__xCkj-Gfxs9yQjxhDRR?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [Key brand pillars: bold, experimental, simple yet refined, bursting with energy, premium feel](https://fathom.video/share/vzEfX2MpFMsW__xCkj-Gfxs9yQjxhDRR?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Inspiration from 70s-90s transition to digital design; emphasis on grid systems and typography](https://fathom.video/share/vzEfX2MpFMsW__xCkj-Gfxs9yQjxhDRR?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Business Model and Brand Vision

  - [Delivers AI-first growth marketing services at scale](https://fathom.video/share/vzEfX2MpFMsW__xCkj-Gfxs9yQjxhDRR?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [Building proprietary AI-enabled workflow software for marketing professionals](https://fathom.video/share/vzEfX2MpFMsW__xCkj-Gfxs9yQjxhDRR?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Seeks brand identity reflecting both human expertise and AI capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/vzEfX2MpFMsW__xCkj-Gfxs9yQjxhDRR?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
  - [Core values: bold, experimental, simple, refined, bursting with energy, premium](https://fathom.video/share/vzEfX2MpFMsW__xCkj-Gfxs9yQjxhDRR?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### Current Brand Challenges

  - [Logo lacks refinement despite having appropriate weight](https://fathom.video/share/vzEfX2MpFMsW__xCkj-Gfxs9yQjxhDRR?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
  - [Typography inconsistent and contrasting](https://fathom.video/share/vzEfX2MpFMsW__xCkj-Gfxs9yQjxhDRR?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [Desire for more uniformity in overall brand presentation](https://fathom.video/share/vzEfX2MpFMsW__xCkj-Gfxs9yQjxhDRR?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
  - [Current black/white photography contrasts with tech elements, but feels superficial](https://fathom.video/share/vzEfX2MpFMsW__xCkj-Gfxs9yQjxhDRR?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)

### Design Direction and Inspiration

  - [Draw from 70s-90s transition to digital design era](https://fathom.video/share/vzEfX2MpFMsW__xCkj-Gfxs9yQjxhDRR?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
  - [Incorporate grid systems, systemic design, strong typography](https://fathom.video/share/vzEfX2MpFMsW__xCkj-Gfxs9yQjxhDRR?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
  - [Balance human touch with confident AI expertise](https://fathom.video/share/vzEfX2MpFMsW__xCkj-Gfxs9yQjxhDRR?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)
  - [Reduce playfulness in primary elements; consider motion for energy](https://fathom.video/share/vzEfX2MpFMsW__xCkj-Gfxs9yQjxhDRR?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)
  - [Simplify typography, potentially moving to one primary font family](https://fathom.video/share/vzEfX2MpFMsW__xCkj-Gfxs9yQjxhDRR?tab=summary&timestamp=1752.0)
  - [Data visualization and infographics important for showcasing metrics](https://fathom.video/share/vzEfX2MpFMsW__xCkj-Gfxs9yQjxhDRR?tab=summary&timestamp=1857.0)

### Project Timeline and Phases

1.  Kickoff (current meeting)
2.  Moodboarding (\~1 week)
3.  Concepting (\~2 weeks)
4.  Brand Identity Development
5.  Brand Guidelines (\~2 weeks)
6.  Final Deliverables: Figma file, PDF, necessary assets

## Next Steps

  - [NBD to add GrowthX team to Slack and Asana for project management](https://fathom.video/share/vzEfX2MpFMsW__xCkj-Gfxs9yQjxhDRR?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [NBD to flesh out detailed project timeline](https://fathom.video/share/vzEfX2MpFMsW__xCkj-Gfxs9yQjxhDRR?tab=summary&timestamp=2059.0)
  - [NBD to begin work on moodboarding phase](https://fathom.video/share/vzEfX2MpFMsW__xCkj-Gfxs9yQjxhDRR?tab=summary&timestamp=2087.0)
  - [Async communication for quick feedback on direction](https://fathom.video/share/vzEfX2MpFMsW__xCkj-Gfxs9yQjxhDRR?tab=summary&timestamp=2068.0)
  - [Regular check-in calls to be scheduled](https://fathom.video/share/vzEfX2MpFMsW__xCkj-Gfxs9yQjxhDRR?tab=summary&timestamp=2096.0)
